description: Medium-style text highlighting and annotation component with color swatches, private notes, and localStorage persistence

attributes.name: for
attributes.description: ID of element to annotate (defaults to first child element)

attributes.name: readonly
attributes.description: Render stored highlights but disable creating new ones

attributes.name: storage-key
attributes.description: Custom localStorage key suffix (default: page pathname)

structure.description: Content to annotate (when not using for= attribute)
